ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., violent, non-violent) */,
  "incident_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of incident (e.g., assault, burglary) */,
  "dates" TEXT /* Date and time of the incident */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the incident (e.g., WARRANTS, OTHER OFFENSES) */,
  "descript" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the incident occurred */,
  "pd_district" TEXT /* Police district where the incident occurred */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the incident (e.g., ARREST, BOOKED, NONE) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the incident (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the incident (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_resolution FOREIGN KEY ("resolution") REFERENCES resolutions ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_pd_district FOREIGN KEY ("pd_district") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of category (e.g., crime, accident) */,
  "category_sub-type" TEXT /* Sub-type of category (e.g., violent crime, property crime) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "district_boundaries" TEXT /* Boundaries of the district (polygon coordinates) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident associated with the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "x" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "y" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "location_sub-type" TEXT /* Sub-type of location (e.g., home, office) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_locations_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution */,
  "resolution_name" TEXT /* Name of the resolution */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution */,
  "resolution_type" TEXT /* Type of resolution (e.g., arrest, warning) */,
  "resolution_sub-type" TEXT /* Sub-type of resolution (e.g., felony arrest, misdemeanor arrest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., police officer, analyst, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., police, fire) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team of the user (e.g., patrol, investigation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident associated with the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., incident report, arrest report) */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident associated with the analytics */,
  "analytics_type" TEXT /* Type of analytics (e.g., crime rate, arrest rate) */,
  "analytics_result" TEXT /* Result of the analytics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_analytics_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the log */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time of the log */,
  "log_action" TEXT /* Action of the log (e.g., login, logout, report submission) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Date and time of the incident
Category of the incident (e.g., WARRANTS, OTHER OFFENSES)
Day of the week the incident occurred
Police district where the incident occurred
Resolution of the incident (e.g., ARREST, BOOKED, NONE)

Sub-type of category (e.g., violent crime, property crime)
ID of the incident associated with the location

Role of the user (e.g., police officer, analyst, administrator)
Department of the user (e.g., police, fire)
Team of the user (e.g., patrol, investigation)
ID of the incident associated with the report
Type of report (e.g., incident report, arrest report)
ID of the incident associated with the analytics
Type of analytics (e.g., crime rate, arrest rate)
ID of the user associated with the log
Action of the log (e.g., login, logout, report submission)
